name: QA 1483
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1483

look for bad syslog entries

**To reproduce this test, please run:**

statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 1483.out.bad)
17a18,27
> Oct 06 19:21:16 3e2a46220767 rc[690304]: pmpost: cannot open or create file "/var/log/pcp/NOTICES": Permission denied
